---
title: "D474_LogisticReg"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(glmnet)
library(tidyverse)
library(ISLR2)
library(boot)
```

```{r}
library(here)
clickstream <- read.table(here("Data", "EditedData", "clickstream_dc.csv"),
                             header = TRUE,
                             sep = ",")
```


```{r}
train <- sample( 1:nrow(clickstream), size = .7*nrow(clickstream) )
train_df <- clickstream[train, ]
test_df <- clickstream[-train, ]
table(clickstream$hi_clicks)
```

```{r}
logmod <- glm( hi_clicks ~ main_category+color+location+model_photography+price, family = binomial, data = train_df)


boot.fn <- function(data, index){
  coef(
  glm( hi_clicks ~ main_category+color+location+model_photography+price, family = binomial, data = data,subset=index)
  )
}

set.seed(1)
# cboot <- boot(clickstream, boot.fn, 50)
# cboot$t0

pred <- predict(logmod,test_df)
pred <- ifelse(pred > 0.5, 1, 0)

mean(test_df$hi_clicks != pred)
```
Latest
